subcodes.title: Words to Emogene Hoagg et al, spoken on 1920-10-24
subcodes.first_line: Yes he passed away. Haji Mirza Haydar Ali was one of the souls who was immersed in the World of R[eality]
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @outward and inward meanings, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @service to others; to the Cause of God
